show.title: Volume Backups
show.description: Schedule volume backups to run automatically at specified intervals
show.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this volume backup?
show.emptyDescription: Create your first volume backup to automate your workflows

validation.volumeNameInvalid: Invalid volume name. Use letters, numbers, '._-' and start with a letter/number.

handle.dialogDescription: Create a volume backup to backup your volume to a destination
handle.taskNameDescription: A descriptive name for your scheduled task
handle.destinationDescription: Choose the backup destination where files will be stored
handle.fetchTooltip: Fetch: Will clone the repository and load the services
handle.cacheTooltip: Cache: If you previously deployed this compose, it will read the services from the last deployment/fetch from the repository
handle.volumesDescription: Choose the volume to backup, if you dont see the volume here, you can type the volume name manually
handle.volumeNameInputDescription: The name of the Docker volume to backup
handle.keepLatestDescription: How many recent backups to keep. Empty means no cleanup.
handle.turnOffDescription: ⚠️ The container will be temporarily stopped during backup to prevent file corruption. This ensures data integrity but may cause temporary service interruption.

restore.dialogDescription: Select a destination and search for volume backup files
restore.alertBlock: Make sure the volume name is not being used by another container.
restore.selectBackupPlaceholder: Search and select a backup file
